reasoning: The question asks if Bitcoin will achieve a new all-time high (above its roughly $109,000 peak from January 2025) on Binance before the end of 2025. Historically, the year following a Bitcoin halving (2025) corresponds to the cyclical market peak, meaning the fundamental arguments for a new ATH this year remain robust. Furthermore, recent market action in May 2025 shows Bitcoin experiencing a strong surge, jumping from potential consolidation back above the $100,000–$103,000 mark by May 9. This puts the asset within striking distance (around 5-6%) of completing a new ATH, with almost eight months remaining in the year. The Polymarket price was 0.70 on May 1; given the recent breakout towards $103,000 since then, the probability of breaching the final 6% over the rest of the year has likely ticked up. I estimate a 77% chance.
